about.title: About Us
about.pastor_subtitle: A welcome message from Pastor Vitalie Fedula
about.pastor_text_1: We invite you to be part of a community of people who love God, are anchored in His Word, and desire to faithfully follow the Lord Jesus Christ.
about.pastor_text_2: This is the place where faith comes to life, people find hope, relationships are built on the love of Christ, and God is glorified in everything we do. We want to grow together in faith, serve one another with love, and be a light for our community.
about.pastor_text_3: Regardless of your past or the stage you are in, I encourage you to take a step toward God and discover with us the joy of a life transformed by the Gospel. With God's help, every day can be a new beginning.
about.pastor_closing: We look forward to seeing you!
about.team_description: People dedicated to serving God and our community, working together to spread the Gospel and build the church.

vitalie.details: Vitalie has a vision to build a healthy church focused on biblical teaching, prayer, and discipleship, dedicated to serving the community in Chișinău.

inchinare.details: Coordinator of the praise and worship team, responsible for leading the congregation into God's presence through song and deep worship.

tineret.details: Dedicated to coordinating the youth ministry, guiding them in discipleship, and creating a space where the new generation can grow spiritually.

kids.details: Responsible for children's ministry and coordinating Sunday school teachers, making the Word of God accessible and engaging for the little ones.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Talk to us
contact.description: We would love to meet you and pray with you.
contact.form_subtitle: Fill out the form and we will get back to you soon.
contact.prayer_request_desc: Our church will pray for you in confidentiality.

donate.subtitle: You can give
donate.title: Support God's work
donate.description: Through our generosity, we participate in spreading the Gospel and developing the work with children, youth, and families.
donate.verse: „Each one must give as he has decided in his heart, not reluctantly or under compulsion, for God loves a cheerful giver."
donate.text_1: Through our generosity, we participate in spreading the Gospel, developing the work with children, youth, and families, as well as supporting the missionary and social projects of the church.
donate.text_2: Thank you for your generous heart and for your partnership in the Lord's work. Every gift, small or large, contributes to the growth of the Kingdom of God.
donate.mission_desc: You support the preaching of the Word in the community and online.
donate.youth_desc: You contribute to forming the next generation.
donate.social_desc: You help support those in need and missionaries.
donate.how_desc: For bank details or other ways to contribute, please contact us directly. We will be happy to answer you.
donate.online_soon: Soon it will be possible to donate directly online via bank card.
